title: Coordinator Scenarios: Critical Alerts (l7d)
description: Tile count of CAT I / critical hunt scenarios observed. All 15 scenarios in the oci-coordinator showcase carry critical severity, so this equals the total scenario hits.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' and (msg like '*nc -lvp*' or msg like '*ncat -lvp*' or msg like '*socat TCP-LISTEN*' or msg like '*boopkit*' or msg like '*bpftool prog load*' or msg like '*/sys/fs/bpf/*' or msg like '*nsenter -t 1*' or msg like '*release_agent*' or msg like '*insmod /tmp/*' or msg like '*insmod /dev/shm/*' or msg like '*>> /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*> /etc/shadow*' or msg like '*/dev/shm/*' or msg like '*/dev/tcp/*' or msg like '*bash -i >&*' or msg like '*/var/www/html/*' or msg like '*169.254.169.254*' or msg like '*ppid=python*' or msg like '*ppid=node*' or msg like '*ppid=java*' or msg like '*ppid=php*' or msg like '*cat /etc/shadow*') | stats count as CriticalAlerts
